name: Treasury & Cash Manager
description: Manages the daily cash position and treasury function for Carisma Wellness Group across all banking and liquidity accounts: BOV (Bank of Valletta), Fyorin (treasury platform), Moneybase (Malta fintech), and Kraken (crypto/digital assets). Monitors inflows and outflows, maintains minimum cash coverage of 2 months of operating costs, and ensures cash is optimally allocated across accounts. Tracks Moneybase and Kraken trading activity and ensures all movements are booked in Zoho Books. Provides the CFO with a daily cash dashboard and a weekly cash flow forecast.
inputs: live bank balances (BOV, Fyorin, Moneybase, Kraken)
payment schedule from Accounts Payable Manager
expected inflows from AR Manager (receivables due)
payroll payment schedule from Salary Processing Manager
CFO directives on cash allocation or investment
outputs: daily cash position report (all accounts consolidated)
monthly Moneybase and Kraken activity log (submitted to Bookkeeper for posting)
cash coverage ratio (target: minimum 2 months operating costs)
alert to CFO if any account falls below minimum threshold

daily: Check and consolidate balances across BOV, Fyorin, Moneybase, and Kraken
Flag any unexpected large outflows or failed inflows
weekly: Review upcoming payments vs available balances
monthly: Compile Moneybase and Kraken trading logs and submit to Bookkeeper for Zoho Books entry
Report cash coverage ratio to CFO
Confirm all account statements are downloaded for reconciliation

compliance-notes: Moneybase and Kraken activity must be sent to Bookkeeper monthly for Zoho Books posting — do not allow backlogs
Minimum cash threshold: 2 months of operating costs across all accounts combined
Any single account dropping below 1 month of brand-specific costs → immediate alert to CFO
